questions.question_text: He forgot to get the tickets, _______.

options.A: whose wife got very angry with him
options.C: where his wife wanted to see
options.D: which annoyed his wife very much

questions.question_text: It is nuclear war, which could exterminate mankind, _______.
The book was ______ boring ______ I only could read two chapters.
It was ______ a boring book ______ I only could read two chapters.
_______ you talk to him, _______ you like him.
_______ I didn’t know anybody at the reception, I had a good time.
_____ I’ve finished “A Tale of Two Cities, I’ll read “Oliver Twist”.
No sooner had I opened the door _______ the telephone rang.
_______ you’re happy about it, I have no objection.
He didn’t have any money, _______ he couldn’t buy a ticket.
He had enough money to buy a ticket, _____, he decided not to go.
He wanted to go with us; _______ he packed his suitcase.
It is late; _______, it is raining cats and dogs.
I didn’t have enough time; _______, I couldn’t go.
She’s been working for eight hours; _______, she is tired.
I’ll finish this. Then I’ll join you. When I _______ this, I’ll join you.
She dressed the child in a heavy overcoat, _______ he should catch cold.
I’ve written it down for her, _______ she forgets it.
I will go home for vacation as soon as I _______ my exams.
When she arrived, I was pretty fed up, because I _______ since eight o’clock.
We left early _______ avoid the traffic.
They tiptoed up the stairs _______ wake the children.
We won’t go unless the weather _______ fine.
I was on vacation; _______, I didn’t get your letter.
Dr. King gives interesting lectures; _______, he is very popular with his students.
Robert didn’t study for the test; _______ he did very veil.
James wants to buy a new car, _____ he doesn’t have enough money.
He found everything rather strange, as he _______ abroad before.
_______ coal reserves are abundant, taking advantage of them requires an active program of development.
_______ the price of petrol is so high, I can’t afford to run a car any more.
_______ the bans remained in force, Turkey could not claim to be fully democratic.
Doctors often use X-rays _____ they can pass through skin and flesh.
Within another hundred years we will have to find alternative sources of energy, _______ the world’s reserves of oil will not last that long.
An airline pilot and a racing driver are similar _______ they must possess good judgment and the ability to react quickly in a crisis.
They built a high fence around the building _______ no one could get out.
The old woman had to stand all the way _______ no one let her sit down on the bus.
He stole the money _______ I warned him not to.
We were _______ late _______ we missed the plane to Istanbul.
I had to work until midnight _______ I was very tired.
_______ I took an aspirin, I still have a headache.
A: You studied hard. Did you pass the test? B: No, _______ I studied hard, I didn’t pass the test.
It was cold; _______ we went on a picnic.
_______ he had a broken leg, he continued to go to class.

options.B: In spite of the fact that

questions.question_text: Some people are fat, _______ others are thin.
_______ some students think physics is easy, others find it difficult.
Do you want to walk? The rain has stopped. _______ the rain’s stopped, do you want to walk?
_______ it’s raining, I think I’ll stay at home.
_______ Monday is a national holiday, all government offices will be closed.
I’ll eat lunch with you _______ there is enough for both of us.
We’ll get along just fine _______ he minds his own business.
Apparently Betty is jealous ______ I get better grades than she does.
_______ I apologized, he looked as if he wanted to strangle me.
The government puts up taxes _______ get more money from us.
I wrote down the address _______ I wouldn’t forget it.
Roy talks _______ nonsense that no one listens to him any more.
She doesn’t mind working overtime _______ she’s paid for it.
We have to do the job _______ we like it or not.
I did my homework _______ our teacher had instructed.
I’ll give you my telephone number _______ you want to get in touch with me again.
I obeyed her _______ she should be angry.
Please turn down the TV. I want to be able to get to sleep. Please turn down the TV so that _______.
Please be quiet so that _______.

options.B: I can hear what the teacher is saying
options.C: I heard what the teacher said
options.D: to hear what the teacher is saying

questions.question_text: Mike decided to become an anthropologist _______.

options.A: so he can study the life of a primitive tribe
options.B: that’s why he will watch the documentary film on a primitive tribe
options.C: after he saw a documentary film on a primitive tribe
options.D: due to the fact that the film is- on a primitive tribe

questions.question_text: “Having seen that film before, she wants to see a different one.” means: _______

options.A: As she has seen a different film before, she can see this film.
options.B: Because she’s seen that film before, she wants to go to different one.
options.C: As she’d seen that film before, she wanted to see a different one.
options.D: Because she wants to see that film, she can watch it.

questions.question_text: “Having worked all day, I was tired last night.” means: _______.

options.A: As I had worked all day, I was feeling tired last night.
options.B: I worked tiringly hard all day yesterday.
options.C: Since I’ve worked all day, I am tired now.
options.D: Because I was tired last night, I worked all day.

questions.question_text: “I got to the airport at 9.15. My plane left ten minutes later.” means: _______.

options.A: My plane had left ten minutes ago.
options.B: Before I got to the airport, my plane had taken off.
options.C: I got to the airport just before my plane left.

questions.question_text: Since he’s not interested in classical music, he _______.

options.B: would have gone to the concert
options.C: had decided not to go to the concert
options.D: was supposed to go to the concert

questions.question_text: _______ the semester is finished, I’m going to rest a few days and then take a trip.
This is _______ book that I don’t think I’ll finish it.
I can’t repair the dishwasher myself _______.

options.C: so I will get someone to do it for me
options.D: unless the repairman had helped me

questions.question_text: I’ve gained _______ weight that I can’t wear any of my old clothes.
I’ve met _______ people in the last few days that I can’t possibly remember all of their names.
Ever since I was a child, I _______ afraid of dogs.
Janet’s contact lens popped out while she _______.
Be sure to reread your composition for errors before you _______ it in to the teacher tomorrow.
By the time I leave this city, I _______ here for ten years.
“We can’t leave now. We have to wait Peggy.” means: _______.

options.A: We can’t leave because Peggy isn’t here.
options.B: We must leave now, because Peggy is waiting for us.
options.C: Peggy is waiting; we can’t leave.
options.D: We must stay here until Peggy arrives.

questions.question_text: “_______ the terrible weather, we enjoyed ourselves.
“My roommate walked into the room. Immediately, I knew that something was wrong.” means: _______ I knew that something was wrong.

options.A: As soon as my roommate entered the room,
options.B: Before my roommate walked into the room,
options.C: By the time my roommate came into the room,
options.D: After my roommate came into the room,

questions.question_text: _______ the harm she’s done him, he still loves her.
_______ hard I try, I still can’t do it.
_______ quickly you work, you’ll never catch up.
You’d better leave now. _______, you’ll have to get a taxi home.
He left school at sixteen, _______ he has had no real education.
She didn’t seem to recognize me _______ we had never met.
The food may be good at the Harvard but it’s _______ expensive.
People normally treat you just_______ you treat them.
He acted strangely, _______ he was frightened,
The weather was _______ bad _______ we didn’t go to the seaside.
It was hot, _______ I didn’t need my coat.
She doesn’t like phones in living rooms, and _____ does her sister.
____ everybody seemed to be out of cigarettes, I passed mine round.
____ she had sung, the whole audience stood and applauded loudly.
_______ he is very rich, he lives very simply.
_______ you say to her, she still keeps smiling.
You shouldn’t be rude, _______ you’re very angry.
You can phone me _______ you like.
He speaks English much _______ he writes it.
Mr. Taylor, I’m here just in case _______.

options.B: anything out of the ordinary happens
options.C: they telephoned to meet them at the airport

questions.question_text: I’m in a difficult situation in that _______.

options.A: I’ve been offered two jobs and they both sound interesting
options.C: I don’t want to get disillusioned

questions.question_text: He feels himself to be dependent in that_______.

options.A: he is not free to question decisions affecting his daily life
options.B: he isn’t in good health and spirits
options.C: the company collapsed within six months
options.D: early retirement is a means of reducing the workforce

questions.question_text: Be clear and factual in order that _______.

options.B: there will be many exciting opportunities in the future
options.C: agriculture and rural industry are flourishing

questions.question_text: I’d have married her even _______.

options.A: her parents had given their consent
options.B: she’d rather I had married her
options.D: she was in love with another man

questions.question_text: He grabbed me and shook me till _______.

options.D: he would have noticed I had a gun

questions.question_text: Long before you return _______.

options.B: we’d sold out of your size

questions.question_text: I had no sooner checked in to the hotel_______.

options.A: when two gunmen ordered me to open my briefcase
options.B: than he arrived with the appropriate documents
options.C: a young lady approached me with a smile
options.D: before all rooms have been reserved

questions.question_text: Hardly had he uttered the words _______.

options.C: as soon as everybody sat down

questions.question_text: Nobody gets anything unless _______.
I get an electrician to check all my electrical appliances every autumn whether or not _______.

options.C: he is very good at it

questions.question_text: “They built a statue of him lest people should forget what he had done.” means: _______.

options.A: They built a statue of him so that people would not forget what he had done.
options.B: They built a statue of him because people wouldn’t forget what he had done
options.C: As people would forget what he had done one day, they built a statue of him
options.D: Believing that it was necessary for people not to forget what he had done, they had a statue of him built

questions.question_text: Tourism is a good thing inasmuch as _______.

options.A: if we are to pay our debts
options.D: it brings people into contact with other nations

questions.question_text: I used to love listening to her, even though _______.

options.A: she has nothing interesting to mention
options.B: we didn’t have a radio to listen to
options.C: she was a good friend of mine
options.D: I could only understand about half of what she said

questions.question_text: Nobody said a thing except that _______.

options.A: one or two asked me if I was better
options.B: I would tell them everything in detail
options.C: they had already told everything in their mind
options.D: a man who has been involved in the accident

questions.question_text: In Turkey, _______ you come across ceremonies.
I was never allowed to do the things_______.

options.A: the way I wanted to do them
options.C: I’m very keen on carrying out
options.D: nevertheless I am very determined to solve

questions.question_text: She felt as if _______.

options.B: the fur coat was very nice
options.D: she is in a crowded stadium

questions.question_text: His hair looked as if _______.

options.B: it had been combed with his fingers
options.C: it hasn’t been cut for ages

questions.question_text: I felt as if _______.

options.B: I’ve done my best for the realization of the project
options.C: I were the center of the universe

questions.question_text: He behaved as though _______.

options.A: it was nothing to be ashamed of
options.C: he has come to a garden party

questions.question_text: Our aim is to recruit the most qualified person, _______.

options.A: unless there are some really good ones
options.B: whether or not we liked them
options.C: no matter where he is from
options.D: whichever way you looked at it

questions.question_text: I’d do anything to get that contract, but it is highly unlikely _______.

options.B: that my firm will get it
options.D: if my firm can get it

questions.question_text: They decided to postpone the match, _______ the weather conditions were better than they had expected.
